---
title: "Projects"
---


## ATHENA : 
Algorithmic Trajectories Heuristic Emulation of Noise Architecture (ATHENA) 
is a Mathematical framework generating parametric signals taylored for the needs of Process and Control engineers. 
My objective was to provide a powerful tool for designing efficient experiments and chemical reactors. 
From system identification, to integration of design and operation, the signals generated by ATHENA are rich enough to excite all the 
frequencies of a system in one and multiple dimensions. 

This work was introduced for the first time at the 59. Jahrestreffen Deutscher Katalyker (DECHEMA) via a poster under the title : 
"Design of Excitation Signals based on Metaheuristics" 

We will open source this project soon. 

Feel free to reach out for future collaborations. 

## EMP : Energy Market Prediction 
More details in the future. 


[👉 View all repositories](https://github.com/AlexN7-Shepard?tab=repositories)
